programmes.show_description: When Benson and Stabler assist in the case of a young girl's shooting, they realise it's more than a typical homicide.
A group of teens terrorising tourists has the SVU squad working overtime; McGrath teams them up with the Bronx gang unit to track down a crucial lead.
Logan and Wheeler investigate the apparent kidnapping of an internet star and her boyfriend. Are they dealing with an elaborate hoax?
Logan and Wheeler probe the fatal overdose of a young man who was heir to a massive fortune. The trail leads to the victim's gold-digging mother.
A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A skittish driver's decision results in a trip to the hospital. A car full of young men swear they were trying to escape an imminent threat.
Crime writer and amateur sleuth Jessica Fletcher is invited to the desert town of Gila Junction by a friend who suspects it is the site of dangerous chemical experiments.
A haunted spirit and antique smugglers are just a few challenges Jessica faces on her Irish vacation.
Jessica is trapped in the dungeon of an ancient Irish castle, but uses her ingenuity to get rescued and find the treasure and a murderer.
Eddie's judgment is clouded when she arrests a loathed college acquaintance. Frank is hesitant to mar the spotless record of a member of the force who tested positive for marijuana.
Danny and Baez join a narcotics task force to track a drug supplier. Jamie and Eddie work to protect a rehabilitated sex offender. Frank forms an unlikely alliance with Mayor Dutton.
Jamie and Eddie ask Erin to drop the charges against a man who bravely rescued a woman from a local hostage situation. Danny and Baez work a case involving car thieves.
When a journalist disappears while working on an expose about an innocent man serving time for murder, Danny and Baez hope that re-examining the original case will help them find her.
Erin enlists Danny to find out who shot Anthony when he was searching for a witness for an upcoming murder trial.
Drama series following the Special Projects wing of the US navy's dedicated federal agency. A smuggling case takes the NCIS team to Mexico to find missing hazardous materials.
Specialised police drama series. Sam returns to Sudan to help a CIA agent gather evidence of Al-Qaeda terrorists in training, but events do not go as planned.
Police drama series. When Deeks shoots an unarmed man, LAPD blames NCIS for ruining their joint operation and breaks ties with them
Police drama series. The team are embroiled in a race against the clock to find a classified and highly dangerous device which could destroy Los Angeles.
Specialised police drama series. Assistant Director Owen Granger makes an impression on the team. Nell goes undercover at the Department of Defence to solve a murder.
A man with dementia confesses to murder, but Benson and Carisi believe there's more to the case. When rumors swirl around the squad room, Fin presses Velasco for the truth.
An internet dating site becomes the source of terror for a young widow. Muncy struggles with Velasco's absence.
Benson tries to help a pop star in a volatile relationship; Rollins struggles with taking the stress of work home with her; Fin teaches a rookie a lesson in respecting fellow officers.
A home invasion and kidnapping leads the SVU to a shocking discovery. Muncy tries to fit in with the squad.
Goren and Eames attempt to identify the victims of a serial killer languishing on death row.
When her late husband's partner is killed on the job, Detective Eames is forced to reopen the case on her husband's murder.
A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A Man Walks into a Bar: US crime drama series. The team has to undergo mandatory psychological evaluations while investigating the death of a naval commander.
Defiance: US crime drama. A defence minister's daughter is kidnapped while under NCIS protection and the team needs to find her before her father signs a controversial treaty.
Kill Screen: US crime drama series. The NCIS team hunts a ruthless murderer after the dismembered fingertips and teeth of a murdered marine are found in a pickpocket's stolen purse.
Compassion: Police drama series. The murder of a con man leads detectives to one of his victims, a dedicated doctor who treats terminally ill children.
Ill-Conceived: Police drama series. When a factory owner is found murdered, the detectives search for an unidentified evening caller whose girlfriend recently gave birth.
Darwinian: Police drama series. After a hit-and-run victim is left to die, McCoy and Southerlyn are determined to get the driver on a murder charge.
Powerful American drama. A female veteran of the second Gulf War is found murdered, and the evidence points to the sister of a former inmate of Abu Ghraib prison.
Powerful crime drama. A woman is pushed to her death off a ferry boat and suspicion falls on her husband's ex-wife.
Crime drama. A prison guard is charged with the cold-blooded murder of an ex-convict who threatened his family.
While investigating the murder of a coast guard officer aboard a cargo vessel, the team finds a Lebanese family seeking refuge in the US.
The team investigates the death of a Navy lieutenant who died of over-hydration, which soon turns into a murder investigation. Gibbs meets Ducky's new lady.
When Gibbs' and Fornell's ex-wife's new husband is kidnapped, the NCIS team partners with the FBI to investigate.
The NCIS team devises an elaborate plan to infiltrate the mob by creating a ruse centred around a wedding.
The search for a suspect who drugs women's drinks in crowded bars leads the SVU to Muncy's brother. Churlish makes a risky move to impress Benson.
A construction tycoon interferes with an SVU investigation into her family. Carisi struggles to get an indictment when the complainant backs down.
